name: AI Meeting Follow-up - 11 Create Draft API

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { run_id: item.run_id, submitted_at: item.submitted_at, department: item.department || '', meeting_title: item.meeting_title || '', meeting_type: item.meeting_type || '', language_hint: item.language_hint || '', source_mode: item.source_mode, status: 'rejected_input', reviewer_name: item.reviewer_name || '', reviewer_notes: '', prompt_version_followup: item.prompt_version_followup, raw_transcript: item.manual_transcript || '', summary: '', action_items_json: '[]', key_decisions_json: '[]', risks_open_questions_json: '[]', employee_faq_json: '[]', ai_opportunities_json: '[]', ambassador_brief_json: '{}', final_markdown_draft: '', final_markdown_edited: '', final_markdown_approved: '', notify_channel: item.notify_channel || 'none', error_message: item.error_message } }];

const item = $input.first().json;
const meeting = { meeting_title: item.meeting_title, department: item.department, meeting_type: item.meeting_type, language_hint: item.language_hint || null, audience: item.audience || null, notify_channel: item.notify_channel || 'none', reviewer_name: item.reviewer_name };
const prompt = `You are creating an internal follow-up package from a fake/demo meeting or training transcript.

Return valid JSON only. Preserve exact meeting metadata. Do not rename the meeting title. Do not invent owners, deadlines, or decisions. If an owner or deadline is not present, use null. Focus on AI adoption value, operational clarity, employee enablement, and follow-up ownership.

Use the exact meeting metadata provided below. Do not rename or paraphrase the meeting title. Do not rewrite department, meeting type, audience, or notify channel values.

The output must be in the transcript/main language, so Czech transcript -> Czech structured output + Czech delivery draft.

Required sections:
summary, action_items, key_decisions, risks_open_questions, employee_faq, ai_adoption_opportunities, ai_ambassador_brief.

Return exactly these JSON types: summary, key_decisions, and risks_open_questions are arrays of strings; action_items, employee_faq, and ai_adoption_opportunities are arrays of objects; ai_ambassador_brief is an object.

Write in the transcript main language.

Return Czech text values if the transcript is in Czech, but keep JSON property names exactly in English.

For action_items, each item must use exactly this shape:
{
  "task": "...",
  "owner": null or string,
  "deadline": null or string,
  "notes": ""
}

Do not use "action", "ukol", "název", or any other key instead of "task".

Meeting metadata (must stay exact):
${JSON.stringify(meeting, null, 2)}

Transcript:
${item.manual_transcript}`;
return [{ json: { ...item, meeting_json: meeting, rendered_followup_prompt: prompt, minimax_body: { model: 'MiniMax-M2.7', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'Return valid JSON only. Preserve exact meeting metadata. Do not rename the meeting title.' }, { role: 'user', content: prompt }], temperature: 0.4 } } }];

const item = $input.first().json;
const isCzech = /czech|čeština|cestina|cz/i.test(String(item.language_hint || ''));

const labels = isCzech
  ? {
      department: 'Oddělení',
      meetingType: 'Typ setkání',
      audience: 'Cílová skupina',
      notifyChannel: 'Notifikační kanál',
      summary: '## Shrnutí',
      topActions: '## Hlavní úkoly',
      keyDecisions: '## Klíčová rozhodnutí',
      risks: '## Rizika a otevřené otázky',
      faq: '## FAQ',
      owner: 'Vlastník',
      deadline: 'Termín',
      notSpecified: 'neuvedeno',
      untitledAction: 'Úkol bez názvu',
      noActions: '- Nebyly identifikovány žádné úkoly.',
      noDecisions: '- Nebyla identifikována žádná klíčová rozhodnutí.',
      noRisks: '- Nebyla identifikována žádná rizika ani otevřené otázky.',
      noFaq: '- Nebyly identifikovány žádné FAQ položky.',
      question: 'Otázka',
      answer: 'Odpověď',
      untitledQuestion: 'Otázka bez názvu',
      noAnswer: 'Odpověď neuvedena.'
    }
  : {
      department: 'Department',
      meetingType: 'Meeting type',
      audience: 'Audience',
      notifyChannel: 'Notify channel',
      summary: '## Summary',
      topActions: '## Top Actions',
      keyDecisions: '## Key Decisions',
      risks: '## Risks and Open Questions',
      faq: '## FAQ',
      owner: 'Owner',
      deadline: 'Deadline',
      notSpecified: 'not specified',
      untitledAction: 'Untitled action',
      noActions: '- No action items identified.',
      noDecisions: '- No key decisions identified.',
      noRisks: '- No risks or open questions identified.',
      noFaq: '- No FAQ items identified.',
      question: 'Q',
      answer: 'A',
      untitledQuestion: 'Untitled question',
      noAnswer: 'No answer provided.'
    };

const f = item.followup;

const summaryLines = Array.isArray(f.summary) ? f.summary.filter(Boolean) : [];
const actionItems = Array.isArray(f.action_items) ? f.action_items : [];
const keyDecisions = Array.isArray(f.key_decisions) ? f.key_decisions : [];
const risks = Array.isArray(f.risks_open_questions) ? f.risks_open_questions : [];
const faq = Array.isArray(f.employee_faq) ? f.employee_faq : [];

const formatAction = (a) => {
  const task = a?.task || a?.action || labels.untitledAction;
  const owner = a?.owner ? `${labels.owner}: ${a.owner}` : `${labels.owner}: ${labels.notSpecified}`;
  const deadline = a?.deadline ? `${labels.deadline}: ${a.deadline}` : `${labels.deadline}: ${labels.notSpecified}`;
  return `- ${task}\n  ${owner}\n  ${deadline}`;
};

const deliveryDraft = [
  `# ${item.meeting_title}`,
  '',
  `${labels.department}: ${item.department}`,
  `${labels.meetingType}: ${item.meeting_type}`,
  item.audience ? `${labels.audience}: ${item.audience}` : null,
  item.notify_channel ? `${labels.notifyChannel}: ${item.notify_channel}` : null,
  '',
  labels.summary,
  ...summaryLines.map((line) => `- ${line}`),
  '',
  labels.topActions,
  ...(actionItems.length ? actionItems.map(formatAction) : [labels.noActions]),
  '',
  labels.keyDecisions,
  ...(keyDecisions.length ? keyDecisions.map((line) => `- ${line}`) : [labels.noDecisions]),
  '',
  labels.risks,
  ...(risks.length ? risks.map((line) => `- ${line}`) : [labels.noRisks]),
  '',
  labels.faq,
  ...(faq.length
    ? faq.map((entry) => `- ${labels.question}: ${entry.question || labels.untitledQuestion}\n  ${labels.answer}: ${entry.answer || labels.noAnswer}`)
    : [labels.noFaq]),
].filter(Boolean).join('\n');

return [{
  json: {
    run_id: item.run_id,
    submitted_at: item.submitted_at,
    department: item.department || '',
    meeting_title: item.meeting_title || '',
    meeting_type: item.meeting_type || '',
    language_hint: item.language_hint || '',
    source_mode: item.source_mode,
    status: 'draft',
    reviewer_name: item.reviewer_name || '',
    reviewer_notes: '',
    prompt_version_followup: item.prompt_version_followup,
    raw_transcript: item.manual_transcript || '',
    summary: summaryLines.join('\n'),
    action_items_json: JSON.stringify(actionItems),
    key_decisions_json: JSON.stringify(keyDecisions),
    risks_open_questions_json: JSON.stringify(risks),
    employee_faq_json: JSON.stringify(faq),
    ai_opportunities_json: JSON.stringify(f.ai_adoption_opportunities || []),
    ambassador_brief_json: JSON.stringify(f.ai_ambassador_brief || {}),
    final_markdown_draft: deliveryDraft,
    final_markdown_edited: '',
    final_markdown_approved: '',
    notify_channel: item.notify_channel || 'none',
    error_message: ''
  }
}];

const item = $input.first().json;
const isCzech = /czech|čeština|cestina|cz/i.test(String(item.language_hint || ''));

const labels = isCzech
  ? {
      department: 'Oddělení',
      meetingType: 'Typ setkání',
      audience: 'Cílová skupina',
      notifyChannel: 'Notifikační kanál',
      summary: '## Shrnutí',
      topActions: '## Hlavní úkoly',
      keyDecisions: '## Klíčová rozhodnutí',
      risks: '## Rizika a otevřené otázky',
      faq: '## FAQ',
      owner: 'Vlastník',
      deadline: 'Termín',
      notSpecified: 'neuvedeno',
      untitledAction: 'Úkol bez názvu',
      noActions: '- Nebyly identifikovány žádné úkoly.',
      noDecisions: '- Nebyla identifikována žádná klíčová rozhodnutí.',
      noRisks: '- Nebyla identifikována žádná rizika ani otevřené otázky.',
      noFaq: '- Nebyly identifikovány žádné FAQ položky.',
      question: 'Otázka',
      answer: 'Odpověď',
      untitledQuestion: 'Otázka bez názvu',
      noAnswer: 'Odpověď neuvedena.'
    }
  : {
      department: 'Department',
      meetingType: 'Meeting type',
      audience: 'Audience',
      notifyChannel: 'Notify channel',
      summary: '## Summary',
      topActions: '## Top Actions',
      keyDecisions: '## Key Decisions',
      risks: '## Risks and Open Questions',
      faq: '## FAQ',
      owner: 'Owner',
      deadline: 'Deadline',
      notSpecified: 'not specified',
      untitledAction: 'Untitled action',
      noActions: '- No action items identified.',
      noDecisions: '- No key decisions identified.',
      noRisks: '- No risks or open questions identified.',
      noFaq: '- No FAQ items identified.',
      question: 'Q',
      answer: 'A',
      untitledQuestion: 'Untitled question',
      noAnswer: 'No answer provided.'
    };

const f = item.followup;

const summaryLines = Array.isArray(f.summary) ? f.summary.filter(Boolean) : [];
const actionItems = Array.isArray(f.action_items) ? f.action_items : [];
const keyDecisions = Array.isArray(f.key_decisions) ? f.key_decisions : [];
const risks = Array.isArray(f.risks_open_questions) ? f.risks_open_questions : [];
const faq = Array.isArray(f.employee_faq) ? f.employee_faq : [];

const formatAction = (a) => {
  const task = a?.task || a?.action || labels.untitledAction;
  const owner = a?.owner ? `${labels.owner}: ${a.owner}` : `${labels.owner}: ${labels.notSpecified}`;
  const deadline = a?.deadline ? `${labels.deadline}: ${a.deadline}` : `${labels.deadline}: ${labels.notSpecified}`;
  return `- ${task}\n  ${owner}\n  ${deadline}`;
};

const deliveryDraft = [
  `# ${item.meeting_title}`,
  '',
  `${labels.department}: ${item.department}`,
  `${labels.meetingType}: ${item.meeting_type}`,
  item.audience ? `${labels.audience}: ${item.audience}` : null,
  item.notify_channel ? `${labels.notifyChannel}: ${item.notify_channel}` : null,
  '',
  labels.summary,
  ...summaryLines.map((line) => `- ${line}`),
  '',
  labels.topActions,
  ...(actionItems.length ? actionItems.map(formatAction) : [labels.noActions]),
  '',
  labels.keyDecisions,
  ...(keyDecisions.length ? keyDecisions.map((line) => `- ${line}`) : [labels.noDecisions]),
  '',
  labels.risks,
  ...(risks.length ? risks.map((line) => `- ${line}`) : [labels.noRisks]),
  '',
  labels.faq,
  ...(faq.length
    ? faq.map((entry) => `- ${labels.question}: ${entry.question || labels.untitledQuestion}\n  ${labels.answer}: ${entry.answer || labels.noAnswer}`)
    : [labels.noFaq]),
].filter(Boolean).join('\n');

return [{
  json: {
    run_id: item.run_id,
    submitted_at: item.submitted_at,
    department: item.department || '',
    meeting_title: item.meeting_title || '',
    meeting_type: item.meeting_type || '',
    language_hint: item.language_hint || '',
    source_mode: item.source_mode,
    status: 'draft',
    reviewer_name: item.reviewer_name || '',
    reviewer_notes: '',
    prompt_version_followup: item.prompt_version_followup,
    raw_transcript: item.manual_transcript || '',
    summary: summaryLines.join('\n'),
    action_items_json: JSON.stringify(actionItems),
    key_decisions_json: JSON.stringify(keyDecisions),
    risks_open_questions_json: JSON.stringify(risks),
    employee_faq_json: JSON.stringify(faq),
    ai_opportunities_json: JSON.stringify(f.ai_adoption_opportunities || []),
    ambassador_brief_json: JSON.stringify(f.ai_ambassador_brief || {}),
    final_markdown_draft: deliveryDraft,
    final_markdown_edited: '',
    final_markdown_approved: '',
    notify_channel: item.notify_channel || 'none',
    error_message: ''
  }
}];

nodes.name: Google Sheets Append Row - Configure Credential
nodes.notes: Bind your Google Sheets credential, keep any service-account file outside the repo, and replace GOOGLE_SHEET_ID_PLACEHOLDER.

nodes.name: LLM Follow-up Generation HTTP - Configure API Key
nodes.notes: Replace Authorization placeholder with n8n credential.

nodes.name: LLM JSON Repair HTTP - Configure API Key
nodes.notes: One repair attempt only. Do not add facts in the repair prompt.
